title: Social / crime / minion prestige talent cleanup
implementationNotes: Crime Lord and Master Privateer minion talents are preserved as follower/minion subsystem-owned. They are not passive actor modifiers.
Action-economy talents expose manual combat action cards through abilityMeta.combatActions and AbilityCombatActionResolver so they appear in the correct combat action economy lane.
Conditional/social/target/ally auras were punted to GM/player management unless the system can truthfully know and execute the context.
Missing staticSheetPolicy is not treated as a bug. Only live legacy modifiers/effects in this scoped bucket were removed when they contradicted canon descriptions.

codedFixes.name: Armored Spacer
codedFixes.behavior: Armored Space Suit counts as proficient when the actor owns Armored Spacer.
codedFixes.staticSheetImpact: Only affects equipped Armored Space Suit proficiency/armor calculation; no flat static bonus.

codedFixes.name: Blaster and Blade II
codedFixes.behavior: Advanced melee weapon damage treats the weapon as two-handed while actor has Blaster and Blade II and an equipped pistol.
codedFixes.staticSheetImpact: Roll/equipped context only; no passive attack or damage modifier.

needsFutureRuntimeHook.name: Multiattack Proficiency (advanced melee)
needsFutureRuntimeHook.owner: Future Full Attack / multiattack penalty resolver
needsFutureRuntimeHook.reason: Fixed in T15 from persistent-choice bucket to fixed advanced-melee roll context. This talent affects Full Attack multiattack penalties only and should not mutate static attack totals.

needsFutureRuntimeHook.name: Ion Mastery
needsFutureRuntimeHook.reason: Reviewed in phase T15. This talent applies only in an ion-weapon attack/damage context and needs a roll-context hook; passive attack/damage ActiveEffects are removed.

dataReview.name: Find an Opening
dataReview.reason: Reviewed in phase T15. The current description is only "Seize the Moment" and appears incomplete or merged; no runtime automation should be inferred from this record.

recommendedNextPatchOrder: Verify combat action cards render in the correct action economy lanes on the character sheet.
Add real usage tracking for once-per-encounter/once-per-round action cards.
Connect minion action cards to the existing MinionActionsMechanics chat helpers where possible.
Implement Ion Mastery in the attack/damage roll-context resolver.
Implement Multiattack Proficiency reductions in the future Full Attack sequence executor.
Repair or confirm the incomplete Find an Opening compendium description before automation.
